author: Beth R.
content: You want me to set up an HP account before I can print/scan on MY OWN PRINTER on MY OWN NETWORK? Nope, not gonna happen. I have 2 other printers (Brother & Epson) and they never force you to log in, unless you're using the "cloud printing" option which I don't use. If this new HP app were actually any good I might consider it, but it's terrible! Visually it's a hot mess, not user friendly at all, and keeps failing to pair with my HP printer. *Uninstalled*! The HP Smart app was so much better.
